title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 19
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to the city tour after breakfast? || Man: I don't think so. The guide cancelled because the weather is too bad. || Woman: We could go to the market instead. || Man: Maybe, but most stalls are closed on Mondays. The science museum is open late, so [1]we're visiting the science museum after lunch[/1]. || Woman: That sounds fine. Shall we meet outside the hotel entrance? || Man: Yes, at four. Bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it at the desk. The bus is quicker. || Man: That should make things easier.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are we still going to the city tour after breakfast?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The guide cancelled because the weather is too bad.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We could go to the market instead.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Maybe, but most stalls are closed on Mondays. The science museum is open late, so we're visiting the science museum after lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds fine. Shall we meet outside the hotel entrance?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, at four. Bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it at the desk. The bus is quicker.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That should make things easier.

questions.question: What are they going to do?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, tour guide leading people through a street, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, science museum hall with exhibits, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, outdoor market with closed stalls, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The man says they are visiting the science museum after lunch.

questions.audio_script: Speaker: Hi, it's Lucy. I'm calling about tomorrow's swimming lesson. I told you it was at nine, but that was my mistake. The pool is closed for cleaning then, and the room is not free after eleven. So [1]your lesson starts at half past ten[/1]. You don't need to bring your towel because there are some in the classroom. If you are late, wait by the reception desk and I'll come down during the break. I know this is short notice, but it should still finish before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Hi, it's Lucy. I'm calling about tomorrow's swimming lesson. I told you it was at nine, but that was my mistake. The pool is closed for cleaning then, and the room is not free after eleven. So your lesson starts at half past ten. You don't need to bring your towel because there are some in the classroom. If you are late, wait by the reception desk and I'll come down during the break. I know this is short notice, but it should still finish before lunch.

questions.question: What time should the listener arrive for the swimming lesson?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at nine o'clock and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at half past ten and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at eleven o'clock and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the lesson starts at half past ten.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the theatre.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the theatre on Wednesday? || Woman: I was going to go by underground, but the nearest station is closed tonight. || Man: I can ask someone to drive us. || Woman: That's kind, but parking near the theatre is very expensive. I checked the timetable, and [1]the river boat stops close to the theatre[/1]. || Man: Great. Does it leave near your house? || Woman: Yes, every twenty minutes. Let's take the one after lunch so we don't have to rush. I already have a travel card. That makes it cheaper for me.

dialogue.speaker: woman

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I can ask someone to drive us.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That's kind, but parking near the theatre is very expensive. I checked the timetable, and the river boat stops close to the theatre.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Great. Does it leave near your house?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, every twenty minutes. Let's take the one after lunch so we don't have to rush. I already have a travel card. That makes it cheaper for me.

questions.context: You hear a customer talking to a shop assistant.
questions.audio_script: Assistant: Can I help you with those gloves? || Customer: Yes, I like the leather pair, but they are too warm for cycling. My old gloves broke last week, so I need new ones today. || Assistant: We also have some thick ski gloves. || Customer: Those are even warmer. I just need something for riding my bike in spring. || Assistant: In that case, try these. || Customer: Thanks. [1]I'll get the thin cycling gloves[/1], if you have them. || Assistant: I do. You can sit here while I get them from the store room. || Assistant: That should make things easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about what to take.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Have you packed for the boat ride? || Boy: Almost. I put in my sunglasses and T-shirt because the forecast was bright yesterday. || Woman: It changed this morning. The boat company said it may rain while we travel across the harbour. || Boy: Really? Then I should change something. || Woman: I would. [1]Take your rain trousers as well[/1]. || Boy: Good idea. I don't want to carry a light sweater all day, and the trousers will fit in my small bag. I'll pack it now before I forget. Thanks for warning me.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you packed for the boat ride?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Almost. I put in my sunglasses and T-shirt because the forecast was bright yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. The boat company said it may rain while we travel across the harbour.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Really? Then I should change something.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I would. Take your rain trousers as well.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Good idea. I don't want to carry a light sweater all day, and the trousers will fit in my small bag. I'll pack it now before I forget. Thanks for warning me.

questions.context: You hear two people in a café.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What are you ordering for lunch? || Man: I wanted the burger, but there is a long queue for it. || Woman: The potato soup looks good. || Man: It does, but it is too hot today. I think [1]I'll take the cold noodle salad[/1]. || Woman: Nice choice. I'm having that too. || Man: Great. Could you save us a table near the window while I pay? The café is getting busy, and I don't want to sit outside. It's still cold today. || Man: That should make things easier. || Man: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost tablet.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Did you find your tablet? || Man: Not yet. I checked the classroom, because I was sure I had it there after the lesson. || Woman: And what about the café? You went there afterwards. || Man: I asked, but nobody had seen it. Just now, the bus driver phoned and said [1]my tablet was on the seat at the back of the bus[/1]. I'm going to collect it before the place closes. || Woman: Good. You looked worried this morning. || Man: I was. I need it for tomorrow, so that is a big relief.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you find your tablet?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not yet. I checked the classroom, because I was sure I had it there after the lesson.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And what about the café? You went there afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I asked, but nobody had seen it. Just now, the bus driver phoned and said my tablet was on the seat at the back of the bus. I'm going to collect it before the place closes.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good. You looked worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I was. I need it for tomorrow, so that is a big relief.

questions.question: Where is the tablet?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, tablet computer on a café table, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, tablet computer on a classroom desk, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, tablet computer on the back seat of a bus, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The man says the bus driver found the tablet on the seat at the back of the bus.
